steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ACCOUNT_NAME, SUM(ACCOUNT_VALUE) AS value 
FROM DFP_ITR_CVM 
WHERE CNPJ = '01.083.200/0001-18' 
  AND ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE = '2024-12-31' 
GROUP BY ACCOUNT_NAME;"} }
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED, ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY, TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED, TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY 
FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION 
WHERE CNPJ = '01.083.200/0001-18' 
  AND REPORT_DATE = '2024-12-31';"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool
